publicationStmt.p: Agentic Historian output; reuse rights not specified.

div.p: --- BAT_663_r_00050.jpg --- uuuu ss uuuuuuuuuuiuuuuuuu uuuuuuuiuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuu uiuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuu ss: uuuuuuuuuuuuuiiiuuui ssuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuiuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuu iiu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuiuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuiuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuuuuuuu uuuuuuu uuuuuuuuuu uuuuuu u iiu
